title: Google Tag Manager
description: Integrated Google Tag Manager (GTM) for analytics tracking across the site.

title: New Support Page
description: Combined the Newsletter page and Contact page into a single Support page. Newsletter info, social links, and community channels are now all in one place.

title: Article Navigation & Scroll Improvements
description: Added compact previous/next article links at the top of each article. Articles now always scroll to the top when navigated to. Added a floating back-to-top button that appears as you scroll down.

title: Footer Redesign
description: Replaced the Categories column in the footer with a new Explore section linking to Categories, Tags, Latest, and Random pages.

title: Courses & Carousel Limits
description: Added course pages and set a display limit on the homepage carousel for a cleaner browsing experience.

title: Sprite Lab Lessons 3-5
description: Published Sprite Lab lessons 3 through 5, including the tag tutorial for lesson 3.

title: Initial Launch
description: Launched STEAM Reader with article browsing, search, category and tag filtering, author pages, and user accounts.
